hooks.description: Loads lightweight context at session start — recent PRs, active tickets, and key conventions for the current repo/branch.

hooks.prompt: Before ending this session, check if there appears to be unfinished work (uncommitted changes, incomplete implementations, or partially executed plans). If there is, suggest the user run /handoff to capture context for the next session. Keep this brief — it's a gentle reminder, not a hard block.
hooks.description: Nudges the user to run /handoff if there's unfinished work before ending the session.
